segments.text: For three transgressions of Moab, and for four, I will not turn away its punishment, Because he burned the bones of the king of Edom to lime.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: But I will send a fire upon Moab, And it shall devour the palaces of Kerioth; Moab shall die with tumult, With shouting and trumpet sound.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And I will cut off the judge from its midst, And slay all its princes with him.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For three transgressions of Judah, and for four, I will not turn away its punishment, Because they have despised the law of the Lord, And have not kept His commandments. Their lies lead them astray, Lies which their fathers followed.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: But I will send a fire upon Judah, And it shall devour the palaces of Jerusalem.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For three transgressions of Israel, and for four, I will not turn away its punishment, Because they sell the righteous for silver, And the poor for a pair of sandals.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: They pant after the dust of the earth which is on the head of the poor, And pervert the way of the humble. A man and his father go in to the same girl, To defile My holy name.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: They lie down by every altar on clothes taken in pledge, And drink the wine of the condemned in the house of their god.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Yet it was I who destroyed the Amorite before them, Whose height was like the height of the cedars, And he was as strong as the oaks; Yet I destroyed his fruit above And his roots beneath.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Also it was I who brought you up from the land of Egypt, And led you forty years through the wilderness, To possess the land of the Amorite.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: I raised up some of your sons as prophets, And some of your young men as Nazirites. Is it not so, O you children of Israel?
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: But you gave the Nazirites wine to drink, And commanded the prophets saying, 'Do not prophesy!'
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Behold, I am weighed down by you, As a cart full of sheaves is weighed down.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Therefore flight shall perish from the swift, The strong shall not strengthen his power, Nor shall the mighty deliver himself;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: He shall not stand who handles the bow, The swift of foot shall not escape, Nor shall he who rides a horse deliver himself.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The most courageous men of might Shall flee naked in that day.
segments.speaker: The Lord
